articles.title: "We are expecting a good crop of mangos for the 2026 season" -- 18/03/2026 09:57
articles.content_fr:
ALERTES SUPPLY
"We are expecting a good crop of mangos for the 2026 season" -- 18/03/2026 09:57
The main mango pest, the fruit fly - which can cause up to 50-80% production losses - is very present in West Africa, particularly in the Ivory Coast, Mali, Burkina Faso, and Senegal. This pest, which causes phytosanitary risks, led to the temporary suspension of Malian mango imports by the European… Impact tactique : Rassurer les enseignes sur la pérennité et la priorité de nos lignes d'exportation malgré les restructurations majeures chez le transporteur ZIM.
